title: Chapter 7: A Summer Walking the Footprints of History

text_block_list.text: It was right before the summer training camp. When I asked Chrono Genesis how she planned to spend her day off—
choice_data_list: You have somewhere you want to go?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes… There's an abandoned racecourse 
we can do a day trip to by train from the training camp…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It was shut down a long time ago, but countless matches were held there… I've been interested in it for a while…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
And so… Umm… Well…
………………

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer. 
Would you like… To come with me…?
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want me to tag along?
Are you sure you want me to tag along?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes. Well, there's nothing there now, but… 
From a historical perspective, I believe it's a very significant place…!
choice_data_list: Sounds great, let's go together

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —…! Y-Yes…!
And so, on our day off during the summer training camp.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Umm… Please take this, if you'd like. 
It's a summary… Of the racecourse we're visiting.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It has information on the racecourse's origins and a summary of the race results. Well… Just the parts I could find, anyway…
choice_data_list: Did you put all this together, Chrono?
Did you put all this together, Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes…! I thought you might enjoy it more if you had some background knowledge beforehand… So I…
choice_data_list: Thank you, this is a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Really…!? 
……I'm glad…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… We still have some time before the train arrives. 
I'll go buy some drinks.
We got off at our destination station and walked along a path surrounded by the scent of grass. However, just walking was a bit boring, so—
choice_data_list: Rock, paper… scissors!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… I win…! Umm… 
G-R-A-D-E-D-R-A-C-E……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. 
It's a neck-and-neck race, back and forth…!
choice_data_list: (Chrono is really in high spirits)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Right. I believe just ahead is… 
……Ah.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Trainer… Would you like to take a detour to that shrine over there? It's also a place connected to racing…
choice_data_list: Then whoever gets there first wins!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Are you sure? I'll show you a clean getaway. 
In that case—…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ready, set…… Go.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Phew.
choice_data_list: <size=36>Aaaah, the shade of these trees is a lifesaver…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Yes… It really brings you back to life.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… That's right. This shrine… It used to be famous for praying for victory in battle. They say the competitors of that era would always come pray here before a race.
choice_data_list: Whoa…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It must have been so lively… With lots of supporters coming here, too…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: But the desire to win is no different from today… Their earnest feelings were the same as ours…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… It's strange. Even though they lived so long ago, 
I somehow feel close to them…
choice_data_list: (The same as us… Huh)
(The same as us… Huh)

text_block_list.text: After that, we left the shrine and started walking again. We made our way through the long, long path, and finally arrived at our destination—

……There was nothing there. Well, to be more precise, 
there was only a small memorial monument.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……I'm sorry. Umm, it's a lot more… 
Simple of a historical site than I expected…
choice_data_list: <size=34>But you can still feel the traces of what used to be</size>

text_block_list.text: The shrubs growing along the path… They're probably the remnants of the course. Thanks to her summary, I could vividly imagine what it looked like back then.
choice_data_list: <size=36>I bet that area over there was the final stretch…</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Then… The gates would be over here. 
Receiving the cheers from the fans over there……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Before the start… My heart is pounding… 
With the expectation of victory… And a little bit of anxiety…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Rounding the fourth corner, entering the final stretch…… I want to cross the finish line in first place. Because there's someone I want to deliver these results to…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Feeling like that… They surely must have. Crying, and laughing… Umm… It's just my own imagination, though.
choice_data_list: No, I get it

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Eh…?
choice_data_list: <size=28>If it's the feelings of the supporters, I understand them too</size>
<size=28>If it's the feelings of the supporters, I understand them too</size>

text_block_list.text:
I cast my thoughts back to the trainers of that era. Imagining them watching over their Horsegirls… Made me feel like 
I couldn't afford to lose, either.
choice_data_list: <size=38>It's almost like… We're connected to history</size>
<size=38>It's almost like… We're connected to history</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…I see… 
Trainer, you're looking at the same scenery as I am…
choice_data_list: …Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah…! 
Umm, I'm going to go take some pictures over there for a bit…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I-I ran away… Was I acting weird just now? But…)
『I had fun too, it was a day where I really felt your passion!』
『I had fun too, it was a day where I really felt your passion!』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (They were… Serious. Trainer…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (They're seriously… Trying to get to know me…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (……I don't want to forget this scenery.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Being here today… 
Might be too small an event to be called history, but…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Just like the people… Who once built the memorial monument on this land…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (I want to give form… To the history of right now…)
(Click)

While waiting for the train home… 
Chrono Genesis was reviewing the photos she had taken.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This one… I wish I had paid more attention to the composition. The background should have had a stronger bokeh effect…
choice_data_list: But it still looks incredibly beautiful

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-You think so…? 
Hehe… Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Umm, let's see, the next photo is……

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Eh? Is this… You, Trainer…?
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
N-No… Umm, it's nothing…! 
Ah… The train's coming, so that's enough of that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(When did I even take that photo… Regardless… 
It's rude of me, so I have to delete it later…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (……But… I still really want one… Just one photo…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Umm…! Trainer, if you don't mind—!
